description: CloudSentinel shift-right pipeline integrity contract for detection, normalization, decision, reporting, and enforcement.
invariants: All required inputs must exist, be non-empty, and be valid JSON before processing.
Any runtime error, malformed payload, or missing artifact fails the stage immediately.
TLS verification for external APIs is mandatory; custom CAs must be installed instead of disabling verification.
Detection, normalization, decision, reporting, and enforcement must each emit machine-readable JSON audit events.
if drift.detected == true then drift.items length > 0
if drift.detected == false then drift.items length == 0
report conversion must preserve source finding counts
HTTP response code from DefectDojo must be 201
reporting cannot synthesize empty payloads when source data is non-empty
